mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendation_history(lottery_type, recommend_date, strategy_name, strategy_index, recommended_numbers, actual_numbers, hit_main, hit_extra, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{lotteryType}, #{recommendDate}, #{strategyName}, #{strategyIndex}, #{recommendedNumbers}, #{actualNumbers}, #{hitMain}, #{hitExtra}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT(lottery_type, recommend_date, strategy_index) DO UPDATE SET strategy_name = excluded.strategy_name, recommended_numbers = excluded.recommended_numbers, actual_numbers = excluded.actual_numbers, hit_main = excluded.hit_main, hit_extra = excluded.hit_extra, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
